summary: I was born right here in Mount Sterling, Kentucky, and have lived a fairly regular life here. I've worked in the carpentry trade all my life and have strong ties to this community. The Post Clinic here has been a real blessing for me, especially when I needed medical attention and blood work after years without it. Mount Sterling is home, and it's where I found the healthcare support that changed my life.

Ryan, my son, was born in Chicago before we moved to Florida. Although I stayed in Mount Sterling, Chicago is where his story begins. His early life there is part of his background before he attended school and wrestled in Florida. Chicago is important because it's where Ryan started his journey before we settled down.

Ryan went to school in Florida, where he was on the Osceola High School wrestling team. Florida was where he developed his wrestling skills and learned discipline through the sport. It’s also where he had his one wrestling pin in Tampa, which was a proud moment for both of us. Florida shaped a big part of Ryan’s youth and athletic experience.

Ryan wrestled on the Osceola High School wrestling team in Florida. Wrestling was a tough sport for him, but he loved it and learned a lot, including how to handle losses. Being part of the Osceola Cobblers team gave him discipline and physical strength, and it was a significant part of his high school experience. I’m proud of his commitment to the team and what he gained from it.

The Post Clinic in Mount Sterling has been a lifesaver for me and Ryan. I first heard about it when my boss was fixing a gutter on the old building, and I ended up filling out an application and getting blood work done within days. Olga Skinner read my blood work and helped me get prescriptions quickly. Ryan also received dental care there, which transformed his smile and boosted his confidence. Accessing healthcare at the Post Clinic has been simple and life-changing for us.

Ryan pinned one opponent in a wrestling match held in Tampa, Florida, which was a highlight of his wrestling career. Although he mostly faced losses, that win in Tampa was special and something I remember well. Tampa represents a moment of success and accomplishment in his wrestling journey during his time in Florida. It’s a place tied to his athletic achievements.

Olga Skinner is the lady at the Post Clinic who read my blood work and called me personally to discuss the results. She was very caring and helped me get prescriptions that I needed quickly. Her support made a big difference in my healthcare experience, and I’m truly grateful for her kindness and professionalism. Olga represents the compassionate care I received at the clinic.

I play Mortal Kombat, and it’s one of my favorite games. Ryan and I both enjoy these kinds of fighting games with superheroes and intense storylines. Mortal Kombat is part of our gaming life and something we bond over. It’s a game that requires focus and skill, much like wrestling did for Ryan.

I also play Final Fantasy, which is an incredible anime-style story game. It’s great to find someone who knows and appreciates it as much as I do. These story games are immersive and fun, and I enjoy the depth they offer. Final Fantasy is a big part of my gaming experience alongside other titles.

Injustice is another game I enjoy, especially because it features superheroes like Superman and Batman fighting each other. It’s similar to Mortal Kombat in style and excitement. Playing Injustice adds to the variety of games I like and keeps me engaged with those superhero battles. It’s part of the gaming world that Ryan and I share.

Superman is one of the superheroes featured in the Injustice game series that I play. Seeing him fight Batman in these games is thrilling and adds to the excitement of the gameplay. Superman represents the heroic characters I enjoy in video games, especially in fighting and story-driven titles. He’s part of the gaming narratives that keep me entertained.

Batman is another superhero character in the Injustice series that I like playing. The battles between Batman and Superman in the game are intense and fun to watch and participate in. Batman’s role in these games adds to the dynamic and excitement of the fighting genre I enjoy. He’s a key figure in the gaming stories I follow.

I recently got a PlayStation 5, which has been an awesome upgrade for my gaming setup. Ryan and I have been playing some great games on it, including the Demon's Souls remake. Having the PS5 has improved my gaming experience and allowed me to enjoy newer, more challenging games. It’s a big step up from older consoles and keeps me connected to the gaming world.

I have the Demon's Souls remake on my PS5, and it’s a challenging but rewarding game. Ryan has played it too, and these types of games require a lot of patience and commitment. I admire how he can beat these tough games multiple times, even though I struggle to get past the first boss. Demon's Souls is part of the gaming challenge that keeps me engaged.

Elden Ring is another game I’ve played and beaten many times. It’s a story-driven game that requires focus and patience, much like the other games Ryan enjoys. I admire Ryan’s dedication to these games because they’re not easy to master. Elden Ring is part of the gaming world that keeps me entertained and mentally engaged.
